name: Black Magic Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely crush 22 Oreos. Mix the crushed crumbs and melted margarine; set aside.
2. Use the remaining crushed Oreos to press onto the bottom of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Place 14 Oreos around the edge of the plate, pressing lightly into the crust.
4. Scoop chocolate ice cream into balls and arrange them in the prepared crust.
5. Coarsely chop the remaining 6 Oreos and sprinkle over the ice cream scoops.
6. Spread the softened vanilla ice cream evenly over the cookie layer.
7. Freeze for 15 minutes.
8. Top with a layer of reserved cookie crumbs, pressing gently into the ice cream.
9. Freeze for several hours or overnight.
10. To serve, garnish with whipped topping and chocolate sauce.
